'''Andel''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and leader of a small [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] gang operating in the [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]]. The [[BloodScar]]-pirate, [[Caaldra]], was disposed to recruiting Andel's group and propositioned him to join. Captain Andel was not inclined to join Caaldra's organization, but told him that he would consider the business and give his answer in a week's time. However, he was killed during a skirmish involving the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and the [[Hand of Judgment]].
